buildCommand: cd website && npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https: https://api.dicebear.com https://images.unsplash.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://* http://localhost:* wss://* wss://localhost:*; frame-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://maps.google.com https://www.google.com https://www.google.co.in http://localhost:5001 https://admin.nexasphere.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
